description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake (Windows 8) that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main, ignoring certain paths. Use a matrix job strategy to build on Windows 2019 and 2022 with various architectures and build types, including Debug and Release configurations. Install Ninja, set up the MSVC development environment, configure and build with CMake, and optionally configure and build with Spectre mitigation.
